metadata.title: Kling 2.6 Motion Control - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Kling 2.6 Motion Control by Kling AI. Performance-driven image-to-video model that transfers real human motion, gestures, and expressions from reference video to character images.

hero.title: Kling 2.6 Motion Control
hero.description: Kling AI's performance-driven motion model. Transfer real human motion, gestures, and expressions from reference video to character images.

introduce.title: About Kling 2.6 Motion Control
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Kling 2.6 Motion Control is Kling AI's performance-driven image-to-video model that transfers real human motion, gestures, and expressions from reference video to character images with stable timing and realism.

items.title: Human Motion Transfer
items.description: Transfer real human motion and gestures to character images.

items.title: Expression Capture
items.description: Capture and transfer facial expressions from reference videos.

items.title: Stable Timing
items.description: Maintain stable timing and realistic motion dynamics.

items.title: Performance Driven
items.description: Performance-driven animation with natural human movement.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Kling 2.6 Motion Control a leading motion transfer model.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static character images into animated videos with motion transfer.

items.title: Reference Video
items.description: Use reference videos to guide motion and movement patterns.

items.title: Gesture Transfer
items.description: Transfer hand gestures and body movements accurately.

items.title: Realistic Animation
items.description: Natural and realistic animation with human-like motion.

items.title: 1080p HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output up to 1080p with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Kling 2.6 Motion Control.

items.title: Character Animation

items.title: Virtual Performers
items.description: Create virtual performers with human-like motion and expressions.

items.title: Dance Videos
items.description: Generate dance videos by transferring choreography to characters.

items.title: Entertainment

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Kling 2.6 Motion Control.

items.title: What is Kling 2.6 Motion Control?
items.description: Kling 2.6 Motion Control is Kling AI's motion transfer model that transfers real human motion and expressions to character images.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Kling 2.6 Motion Control specializes in Image To Video generation with motion transfer from reference videos.

items.title: Who created Kling 2.6 Motion Control?
items.description: Kling 2.6 Motion Control is created by Kling AI, a leading AI video generation company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Kling 2.6 Motion Control excels at transferring real human motion, gestures, and expressions with stable timing.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Kling 2.6 Motion Control through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How does motion transfer work?
items.description: Upload a character image and a reference video of human motion, and the model will animate the character with those movements.

cta.title: Ready to Try Kling 2.6 Motion Control?
cta.description: Experience Kling AI's motion transfer. Animate characters with real human motion.
